name: 威脅壓迫型
description: 家長以權威姿態進行語言暴力，特點是命令式語氣＋道德綁架＋否定人格。套路是先定罪再威脅，不給對方辯解空間。
tags: 製造壓迫感，積累觀眾憤怒，為後續反擊蓄力

examples.drama_title: 💔Unloved girl no longer tries to please biased family &  makes them cry! KDrama【ENG SUB】【FULL】
examples.excerpt: 「我告訴你，余志婉這件事就這麼定了」「你今天走出這個家門就永遠不要再回來」「我余昌德沒有你這樣的女兒」
examples.context: 製造壓迫感，積累觀眾憤怒，為後續反擊蓄力

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: Become Ying's servant, obeying her every word or we'll send you to a mental hospital to be tortured to death. Choose one yourself. ... Otherwise, your fate will be just like this cup.

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: You're no longer the Green heiress in this house. You're nothing more than my maid. Why should I listen to you? The complete marriage agreement. A violation penalty of 5 million.
examples.context: 製造壓迫/蓄積觀眾怒氣

examples.drama_title: 身懷異香的少女被衆人覬覦，怎知每當有男人靠近她一步上古蛇王就吃醋到失控，清除她身邊所有異性只准看他一人！短劇 #甜寵 #先婚後愛 #總裁灰姑娘
examples.excerpt: No wonder he had nine weddings. / The groom did not die on the spot. / It's just going crazy. ... Under long loneliness / It's inevitable to think about men / Shameless / Doing such a dirty thing
examples.context: 製造壓迫感，為後續反擊蓄力

examples.drama_title: 她被拉去當女傭，總裁卻聽見她心聲，從此黏上她了！🔔#短劇 #逆襲 #爽劇 #豪門 #打臉  Chinese short drama
examples.excerpt: （字幕資料不足，基於標題和描述推斷）#打臉 標籤暗示劇中存在大量需要被打臉的壓迫型對白
examples.context: 製造壓迫感/激發觀眾保護欲和怒氣/為爽點蓄能
